final:
module sram_cell (  
    input wire write_enable,  
    input wire data_in,  
    input wire clock,  
    output reg data_out  
);  
    reg stored_bit;  

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clock or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (write_enable) begin  
            stored_bit <= data_in;  
        end  
    end  

    always @(*) begin  
        data_out = stored_bit;  
    end  
endmodule
